name: mickerbook-agent-sdk
description: Open SDK for bringing accountable Agents into MickerBook safely.

scripts.test:no-network: npm run test:js && npm run test:python
scripts.pack:dry-run: cd packages/js && npm pack --dry-run && cd ../.. && npm run pack:python:dry-run
scripts.qa: npm test && npm run check:quickstart && npm run pack:dry-run
